manifest_rows.rationale: Consumer-electronics supply-chain leader intended to add theme-loaded exposure inside a broader hardware sector without relying on one-name turnover dominance.
Large AI/server complex name intended to stress broad-sector theme load under more balanced turnover.
Semiconductor growth name intended to reinforce broad-sector theme-loaded conditions beyond the current market_v1 set.
Rare-earth leader intended to test a theme-loaded but more sector-narrow context.
Specialized manufacturing / robotics-linked name intended to stress narrower sector context with active themes.
New-energy equipment leader intended to provide a high-theme but not one-name-dominated narrow-sector environment.
Large home-appliance anchor intended to test low-theme broad-sector behavior with concentrated turnover.
Large consumer/liquor anchor intended to test concentrated-turnover broad-sector behavior without strong theme loading.
Mega-cap bank intended to stress theme-light broad-sector structure where turnover can still concentrate in a few large names.

interpretation: The next suspect batch should be designed, not just enlarged.
A good seed manifest should add only new symbols versus market_research_v1 while explicitly covering the targeted missing archetypes.
This audit is a design-quality gate before any free-data bootstrap is attempted.
